_note: Hand-maintained fallback (no Python interpreter available in this environment — scripts/lessons.py could not run). Bookkeeping is best-effort per references/lessons.md's no-script fallback path.

lessons.source: spec.md SCAF-02 (P1 AC2) / validation.md AC table
lessons.text: When a spec designates a manual/external verification method (DevTools inspection, CI dashboard observation) for an acceptance criterion, flag it as a spec-precision gap rather than silently passing it from static file evidence alone.

lessons.source: spec.md SCAF-08 (P2 AC2) / validation.md AC table
lessons.text: When a spec designates a manual/external verification method (DevTools inspection, CI dashboard observation) for an acceptance criterion, flag it as a spec-precision gap rather than silently passing it from static file evidence alone.

lessons.source: apps/frontend/package.json:10, apps/backend/package.json:10 (typecheck script uses tsc -b, design.md specifies tsc --noEmit)
lessons.text: When a per-package script deviates from the design doc's literal command even for a technically sound reason, mark the deviation with an inline comment or equivalent doc note so it is not silently undocumented.
